column1: # reverse-doris-trino.results.tsv — Part-1 live verification of clickhouse->doris/trino rename candidates
# engines: Doris (FE doris-0.0.0/pr62767-local, BE 4.1.2) + Trino 481. Diffed vs precomputed clickhouse_value.
# columns: fn  doris_output  trino_output  doris_matches(ch)  trino_matches(ch)
# match normalization: array spacing [1, 2]==[1,2], quotes stripped, booleans 1/true & 0/false, float 6dp, ints as-is
# VERDICT NOTES for the brikk-sql agent (Part 2):
#  arrayUniq        : Doris has NO 'array_unique' (ERR). Value-equal form is size(array_distinct(...))=3 — needs a composite, not a plain name map. DROP the bare name.
#  jaroSimilarity   : Doris has NO jaro-family scalar (jaro_similarity/jaro/jaro_winkler_similarity all ERR). No rename to ship for Doris.

#  splitByRegexp    : Doris split_by_regexp(str,pattern) MATCHES (arg-swapped from CH). Trino regexp_split(str,pattern) does NOT match with the CH literal '\\d' — Trino treats backslash literally (regex becomes \\d), so no digit split. Real string-escape divergence; name/arg-order are right but value-equality needs escape handling.

#  xxHash64         : Doris xxhash_64 RUNS but value differs (8696274497037089104 vs CH 4952883123889572249) — different impl/seed. Valid name, DIVERGENT value (keep as divergent hazard, not a clean rename).
#  arrayElement->element_at : value-equal here (index 2 -> 20); negative-index semantics still divergent per handoff.
#  blank rows (arrayDotProduct/hasAll/hasAny/tgamma): no doris_call or trino_call candidate provided — nothing to verify.
